movie.actors: Tom Hardy, Michelle Williams, Riz Ahmed, Scott Haze
movie.plot: A failed reporter is bonded to an alien entity, one of many entities who have invaded Earth. But the entity takes a liking to Earth and decides to protect it.
movie.title: Venom
movie.writer: Jeff Pinkner (screenplay by), Scott Rosenberg (screenplay by), Kelly Marcel (screenplay by), Jeff Pinkner (screen story by), Scott Rosenberg (screen story by), Todd McFarlane (Marvel's Venom Character created by), David Michelinie (Marvel's Venom Character created by)
